# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-microservice-a
  labels:
    app: my-microservice-a
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservice-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-microservice-a
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-microservice-a
          image: myregistry/my-microservice-a:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-microservice-b
  labels:
    app: my-microservice-b
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservice-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-microservice-b
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-microservice-b
          image: myregistry/my-microservice-b:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
